creator: editor@callfortesting.org
text:
Tested on FreeBSD 13.0-ALPHA1 two times to be certain.

The WITHOUT_TESTS_SUPPORT build option fails with:

--- all_subdir_lib ---
/usr/src/lib/csu/tests/fini_test.c:43:10: fatal error: 'atf-c.h' file not found
#include <atf-c.h>
         ^~~~~~~~~

More output:

--- de_DE.UTF-8.out ---
grep -v -E '^(#$|#[ ])' < /usr/src/share/msgdef/de_DE.UTF-8.src > de_DE.UTF-8.out

--- acpi_hp.4.gz ---
